# CANDIDATE: MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE_VARIANT_A

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** filter_change
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The midday trendline gate (block single-trigger trendline_rejection entries in 11:30–14:00 ET) improves edge capture by +89% (+3.8/trade → +7.2/trade). Variant A implements the gate based purely on trigger count = 1 during the midday window.

## Mechanism

- Time window: 11:30–14:00 ET
- Block condition: `trendline_rejection` trigger with exactly 1 active trigger (no confluence)
- Pass condition: trigger count ≥ 2 OR time outside midday window

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | 12:15 entry (loser) → blocked by gate | +4/c improvement | +4/c |
| 5/01 winner | PM entry unaffected | No change | 0 |
| 5/04 winner | 11:15 HIGH entry fires (quality fallback) | Preserved | 0 |
| 5/05 loser | No v14e bear signals | No change | 0 |
| 5/06 loser | No v14e bear signals | No change | 0 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | No trendline signals | No change | 0 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | No trendline signals | No change | 0 |

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper realizes ~14% of headline
2. **Sample bias:** 307 real-fills trades across 345 days; all from 2025-2026 SPY 0DTE
3. **Out-of-sample:** Real-fills OOS = 307 trades (full OOS window)
4. **Real-fills:** PASS — +7.2/trade gated vs +3.8/trade ungated
5. **Failure modes:** If midday window misaligned with market hours, blocks valid setups; worst case: -$15/c on blocked winner days
6. **Concentration:** top5=51%, 12/17 months positive — PASS
